cases.passage: In a hospital, a patient is being treated for a severe burn injury. The doctor prescribes a topical application of a solution containing ethanol (CH3CH2OH) to help clean and disinfect the wound. The patient's skin is already inflamed and sensitive due to the burn. To reduce the irritation caused by ethanol, the doctor decides to dilute it with water. However, the doctor needs to ensure that the concentration of ethanol remains effective in killing the bacteria that could lead to infection. Which of the following statements is true regarding the properties of ethanol that makes it suitable for this application?

questions.q: What is the primary function of ethanol in this medical application?
opts: (A) To act as an antiseptic by killing bacteria
(B) To moisturize the skin and aid in wound healing
(C) To reduce inflammation and ease pain
(D) To prevent infection by creating a physical barrier
questions.explanation: Ethanol acts as an antiseptic by killing bacteria, making it suitable for this medical application.

questions.q: Why does the doctor decide to dilute ethanol with water?
opts: (A) To increase the concentration of ethanol
(B) To reduce the irritation caused by ethanol
(C) To enhance the antibacterial properties of ethanol
(D) To make the solution more viscous
questions.explanation: The doctor decides to dilute ethanol with water to reduce the irritation caused by ethanol on the patient's sensitive skin.

questions.q: What is the role of ethanol's boiling point in this application?
opts: (A) It helps in disinfecting the wound
(B) It makes the solution more stable
(C) It helps in reducing the irritation caused by ethanol
(D) It has no significant role in this application
questions.explanation: Ethanol's boiling point has no significant role in this medical application.

questions.q: Why is it essential to maintain the concentration of ethanol in this application?
opts: (A) To ensure the solution is non-toxic
(B) To maintain the pH level of the solution
(C) To ensure the solution is effective in killing bacteria
(D) To make the solution more viscous
questions.explanation: It is essential to maintain the concentration of ethanol in this application to ensure the solution is effective in killing bacteria.

questions.q: What would happen if the doctor used undiluted ethanol on the patient's skin?
opts: (A) The patient would experience severe irritation and discomfort
(B) The patient would experience no adverse effects
(C) The solution would be ineffective in killing bacteria
(D) The solution would be more stable
questions.explanation: If the doctor used undiluted ethanol on the patient's skin, the patient would experience severe irritation and discomfort.

cases.passage: A perfume manufacturer wants to create a new fragrance that has a sweet, floral scent. The company decides to use an ether, diethyl ether (CH3CH2OCH2CH3), as a solvent to dissolve and blend the fragrance oils. However, the manufacturer wants to ensure that the ether does not react with the fragrance oils or any other components in the perfume. What is the primary reason for this concern?

questions.q: Why is diethyl ether used as a solvent in perfume manufacturing?
opts: (A) Due to its high boiling point
(B) Due to its low boiling point
(C) Due to its ability to dissolve a wide range of compounds
(D) Due to its high viscosity
questions.explanation: Diethyl ether is used as a solvent in perfume manufacturing due to its ability to dissolve a wide range of compounds.

questions.q: What is the primary concern when using diethyl ether in perfume manufacturing?
opts: (A) Its high boiling point
(B) Its low boiling point
(C) Its reactivity with fragrance oils or other components
(D) Its high viscosity
questions.explanation: The primary concern when using diethyl ether in perfume manufacturing is its reactivity with fragrance oils or other components.

questions.q: Why is it essential to avoid using diethyl ether in perfume manufacturing?
opts: (A) Due to its toxicity
(B) Due to its flammability
(C) Due to its reactivity with fragrance oils or other components
(D) Due to its high cost
questions.explanation: It is essential to avoid using diethyl ether in perfume manufacturing due to its reactivity with fragrance oils or other components.

questions.q: What would happen if the manufacturer used diethyl ether in perfume manufacturing without proper precautions?
opts: (A) The perfume would have a stronger, more pleasant scent
(B) The perfume would be more stable and have a longer shelf life
(C) The perfume would be contaminated and have an unpleasant odor
(D) The perfume would be more expensive to produce
questions.explanation: If the manufacturer used diethyl ether in perfume manufacturing without proper precautions, the perfume would be contaminated and have an unpleasant odor.

questions.q: Why is it essential to choose the right solvent for perfume manufacturing?
opts: (A) To ensure the perfume has a strong, pleasant scent
(B) To ensure the perfume is stable and has a long shelf life
(C) To avoid contamination and ensure the perfume has a pleasant odor
(D) To reduce production costs
questions.explanation: It is essential to choose the right solvent for perfume manufacturing to avoid contamination and ensure the perfume has a pleasant odor.
